headline: Is Comcast (CMCSA) Pricing Fair After Recent Share Rebound And DCF Valuation Gap?
summary: If you are wondering whether Comcast's current share price really reflects what the business is worth, you are not alone. This article is going to focus squarely on that question. The stock last closed at US$32.09, with returns of 4.2% over 7 days, 8.4% over 30 days, 8.6% year to date, 0.3% over 1 year, 5.4% over 3 years and a 30.7% decline over 5 years. This may have you wondering whether the recent strength is a turning point or just noise. Recent coverage around Comcast has continued to...

headline: ITV insists Sky sale is still on as ad revenues fall
summary: ITV is racing to sell its television business to Sky for £1.6bn following a fresh drop in advertising revenues.

headline: CNBC Sport: Paramount may unwind WBD's sports strategy if merger goes through
summary: WBD's sports strategy it has deployed since it lost NBA rights may not make sense if it's acquired by Paramount.

headline: ITV remains in talks over Sky TV deal as profits slip
summary: The UK TV giant first confirmed talks in November but said on Thursday there was still ‘no certainty’ over an agreement.

raw.headline: ITV remains in talks over Sky TV deal as profits slip
